标题: Ukraine says Russian forces advance on eastern front
标题(中文): 乌克兰称俄罗斯军队在东部前线推进
摘要: Ukrainian military officials reported continued Russian advances in the eastern Donbas region, with heavy fighting around Avdiivka and Bakhmut.
摘要(中文): Ukrainian 军事官员 报道 俄罗斯持续推进 in the 东部顿巴斯地区, with 激战 around Avdiivka and Bakhmut.

标题: Israel conducts strikes in Gaza after rocket fire
标题(中文): 以色列 conducts strikes in 加沙 火箭弹袭击后
摘要: The Israeli military carried out airstrikes in Gaza overnight following rocket attacks from Palestinian militants.
摘要(中文): The Israeli 军事 carried out 空袭 in 加沙 连夜 following 火箭弹 attacks from 巴勒斯坦武装分子.

标题: US warns Iran over nuclear program escalation
标题(中文): 美国就核计划警告伊朗 escalation
摘要: The United States has warned Iran against further escalation of its nuclear program, saying all options remain on the table.
摘要(中文): The United States has warned 伊朗 against further escalation of its 核武器 program, saying 所有选项都在考虑范围内.

标题: NATO allies discuss increased support for Ukraine
标题(中文): 北约盟国讨论增加支持 for 乌克兰
摘要: NATO defense ministers met to discuss increasing military support for Ukraine amid ongoing conflict with Russia.
摘要(中文): 北约 国防部长开会 to 讨论增加军事支持 for 乌克兰 在持续冲突中 with 俄罗斯.

标题: Israel conducts airstrikes in Gaza after rocket fire
标题(中文): 以色列 加沙火箭弹袭击后以军发动空袭
摘要: The Israeli military carried out airstrikes in Gaza overnight following rocket attacks from Palestinian militants. The exchange marks another escalation in the long-standing conflict.
摘要(中文): The Israeli 军事 carried out 空袭 in 加沙 连夜 following 火箭弹 attacks from 巴勒斯坦武装分子. 这次交火标志着又一次升级 in the 长期冲突.

标题: Russian military announces new offensive in Donbas
标题(中文): 俄罗斯军方宣布新攻势 in 顿巴斯
摘要: Russian military officials announced a new offensive operation in the Donbas region. Ukrainian forces are preparing defensive positions.
摘要(中文): 俄罗斯 军事官员 宣布 a new 攻势 operation in the 顿巴斯 region. 乌克兰军队正在准备 防御阵地.
